reasons.sdxl_checkpoint_impact_pack_route: V1 parity route: SDXL checkpoint generate/img2img/inpaint can be patched after the base image with Impact Pack detailer nodes.
reasons.sd15_checkpoint_compatible_experimental: SD1.5 checkpoint appears compatible with the same Impact Pack path, but remains experimental until runtime visual parity is validated.
reasons.outpaint_not_validated: Outpaint needs mode-specific canvas/mask safety validation before ADetailer can mutate the graph.
reasons.modern_or_gguf_route_unproven: Flux/Qwen/Z-Image/HiDream and GGUF/native routes do not have a proven safe Impact Pack patch path and must not fallback to SDXL/checkpoint behavior.
reasons.checkpoint_only_for_v1_parity: V1 parity is checkpoint-image-detailer based; diffusion_model/native/GGUF loader mutation is not proven for this feature.
reasons.provider_family_gated: Provider/video-family routes are gated because they cannot safely use Comfy Impact Pack image detailer nodes.
reasons.finish_mount_only: ADetailer is a built-in Image → Finish extension; non-Finish configuration surfaces do not mount the normal UI.
reasons.finish_mount: ADetailer mounts in Image → Finish; route state still controls whether controls are active.
reasons.reference_route_not_migrated: Reference workspace is not the V1 ADetailer finishing surface and stays diagnostic/planned until a reference-edit policy exists.
reasons.not_generation_compiler: This workspace does not compile an image generation graph for ADetailer to patch.
reasons.unknown_route: No explicit ADetailer support entry exists for this normalized route.
reasons.nodes_missing: ComfyUI Impact Pack detailer nodes were not detected. Install/enable the required custom nodes before ADetailer can patch the graph.
reasons.nodes_unchecked: Node availability was not provided, so ADetailer remains provider-gated for runtime mutation.
reasons.nodes_ready: Required Impact Pack nodes were detected for the selected route.
